name: Peachy Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Spray two 8-inch cake pans with nonstick cooking spray and lightly flour them. In a large bowl, stir together the flour, sugar, cocoa powder, baking soda, and salt. Add water, oil, vinegar, and vanilla extract. Beat until ingredients are well blended and batter is smooth. Pour into prepared pans. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool for 10 minutes before removing from pans. Let cool completely on wire racks. Just before serving, place one cake on a serving plate; arrange half of the peach slices on this layer. Top with second cake and remaining peaches. Cut into slices; serve immediately.
